productDisplayName: Fabindia Grey Hand Printed Chanderi Dupatta
description: Style Note Crafted with age old printing and dyeing traditions, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand considers ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This dupatta is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-consious global citizen. It looks great when styled with ethnic kurtas or with an understated pastel hued top and cardi.  Product Details Grey printed dupatta with Chaderi print Material and Care Silk cotton blend Dry clean only Size Approximate length: 252 cm Approximate width: 92 cm
